TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_credential
TABLE.COMMENT: Plugin-managed connector credentials for Moodle MCP bootstrap and remote access.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The Moodle user this connector credential belongs to.

FIELD.NAME: token
FIELD.COMMENT: Opaque connector credential token.

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Human-readable label for operator inspection.

FIELD.NAME: serviceidentifier
FIELD.COMMENT: Connector-managed service boundary identifier.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Restricted context anchor for connector credential use.

FIELD.NAME: tokentype
FIELD.COMMENT: 0=session-linked or short-lived bootstrap credential, 1=durable remote grant.

FIELD.NAME: sid
FIELD.COMMENT: Linked browser session identifier when bootstrap is session-bound.

FIELD.NAME: validuntil
FIELD.COMMENT: Credential expiry timestamp.

FIELD.NAME: iprestriction
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional IP restriction for credential use.

FIELD.NAME: lastaccess
FIELD.COMMENT: Last successful use timestamp.

FIELD.NAME: revoked
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the connector credential has been revoked.

TABLE.NAME: webservice_mcp_audit
TABLE.COMMENT: Audit trail for connector discovery and tool execution.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle user associated with the transport action.

FIELD.NAME: credentialid
FIELD.COMMENT: Connector credential used for the transport action, when present.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Restricted context for the request.

FIELD.NAME: serviceid
FIELD.COMMENT: Resolved external service id for the request.

FIELD.NAME: sessionid
FIELD.COMMENT: MCP transport session id.

FIELD.NAME: requestid
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON-RPC request id.

FIELD.NAME: action
FIELD.COMMENT: Audit action type such as discover or tool_call.

FIELD.NAME: toolname
FIELD.COMMENT: Tool name for tool-call events.

FIELD.NAME: mutating
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the audited request mutates Moodle state.

FIELD.NAME: outcome
FIELD.COMMENT: Result outcome such as success or error.

FIELD.NAME: detailcode
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional restriction or error code.

FIELD.NAME: auditid
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable public audit identifier returned to clients.
